case_title: TINA LYNN OSINSKI VS. CAROL HILLMAN

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $75.00) SERVED APR-26-2019, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT HILLMAN, CAROL

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-22-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-22-2019 BY JUDGE PRO TEM MAXWELL PRITT. PLAINTIFF IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT IS PRESENT. HONORABLE JUDGE PRO TEM MAXWELL PRITT FINDS GOOD CAUSE TO ALLOW THE DEFENDANT TO SEEK TO VACATE JUDGMENT IF INSURANCE DOES NOT REIMBURSE FOR DAMAGES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: MAXWELL PRITT; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
STIPULATION FOR CASE TO BE HEARD BY JUDGE PRO TEM. FILED BY OSINSKI, TINA LYNN HILLMAN, CAROL
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,991.10 FILED BY OSINSKI, TINA LYNN AS TO DEFENDANT HILLMAN, CAROL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-22-2019 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF OSINSKI, TINA LYNN AS TO DEFENDANT HILLMAN, CAROL
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-22-2019 - JUDGMENT.
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: COPY SC-100 MAILED TO CAROL HILLMAN ON 4-9-19. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "UNCLAIMED - RETURN TO SENDER - UNABLE TO FORWARD."

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OSINSKI, TINA LYNN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HILLMAN, CAROL $991.10 PRINCIPAL, $65.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,056.10, DEFENDANT SHALL PAY PLAINTIFF DAMAGES OF $991.10, WHICH REPRESENT THE COST TO REPAIR PLAINTIFF'S VEHICLE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
